mapper.select: SELECT f.*, p.id as fav_product_id, p.title as fav_product_title, p.price as fav_product_price, p.status as fav_product_status, p.seller_id as fav_product_seller_id, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id WHERE f.id = #{id}

SELECT f.*, p.id as fav_product_id, p.title as fav_product_title, p.price as fav_product_price, p.status as fav_product_status, p.seller_id as fav_product_seller_id, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as firstImageUrl FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN product p ON f.product_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, product_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
